{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Akura Paths
| introduced = cradle-05-ghostwater
}}

== Ghostwater ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|There are rumors regarding [[Akura Paths]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c2">''Ghostwater'', chapter 2</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
[[Category:Terminology]]
